system.description: Crossbow bolts are similar to arrows, but can only be fired from a crossbow. Bolts can be tipped with either sharp or blunt heads. Sharp heads cause W4 Wounds. Blunt heads inflict W1 Wounds. When firing a blunt bolt, your crossbow’s range will be reduced to Medium. It is assumed any bolts you fire will have a sharp head, unless you state otherwise. You don't need to track how many blunt bolts you have versus pointed, they're the same item. Bolts come in bundles of 20.
